title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Nursing Council Act, 1947. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2***.] (3) It shall come into force at once.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 45 of 1957, s. 2, for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 1-12-1958). 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10- 2019).
